mapper.sql: id, excludeType, bindType, bindCode, bindKey, excludeTools, createTime, updateTime
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_mcp_tool_exclude ( excludeType, bindType, bindCode, bindKey, excludeTools, createTime, updateTime ) VALUES ( #{excludeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bindType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bindCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bindKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{excludeTools,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_mcp_tool_exclude SET excludeType = #{excludeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bindType = #{bindType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bindCode = #{bindCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bindKey = #{bindKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, excludeTools = #{excludeTools,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
